'''machana''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ivoqualine|ivoqualine]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-ch-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ivoqualine|ivoqualine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| machana
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæchænæth|mæchænæth]] || [[word:mæchænæj|mæchænæj]] || [[word:mæchænæsh|mæchænæsh]] || [[word:mæchænæ|mæchænæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:machachanath|machachanath]] || [[word:machachanaj|machachanaj]] || [[word:machachanash|machachanash]] || [[word:machachana|machachana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:machanath|machanath]] || [[word:machanaj|machanaj]] || [[word:machanash|machanash]] || [[word:machana|machana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:machafnath|machafnath]] || [[word:machafnaj|machafnaj]] || [[word:machafnash|machafnash]] || [[word:machafnaf|machafnaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:machanatha|machanatha]] || [[word:machanaja|machanaja]] || [[word:machanasha|machanasha]] || [[word:machanaka|machanaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:machanath|machanath]] || [[word:machanaj|machanaj]] || [[word:machanash|machanash]] || [[word:machana|machana]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:machanathal|machanathal]] || [[word:machanajal|machanajal]] || [[word:machanashal|machanashal]] || [[word:machanakal|machanakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:machanathatha|machanathatha]] || [[word:machanajaja|machanajaja]] || [[word:machanashasha|machanashasha]] || [[word:machanaka|machanaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:machanathan|machanathan]] || [[word:machanajan|machanajan]] || [[word:machanashan|machanashan]] || [[word:machanakan|machanakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:machanathaoro|machanathaoro]] || [[word:machanajaoro|machanajaoro]] || [[word:machanashaoro|machanashaoro]] || [[word:machanakaoro|machanakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
